title: Rocks of the Wild
body:
Rocks of the Wild adds a few different rock formation.

Generating on all heights, in caves on the surface, on sand, on terracotta - EVERYWHERE! 



If you break a rock formation (instantly breaking) you will recieve a cobblestone in return.

If you're a modpack dev you can probably do some magic and have different drops ;) 


***

## **Support the work**

If you enjoy what I create, supporting the page helps me spend more time on updates, polishing features, fixing issues, and creating new content for future releases.

Every bit of support helps keep development going — thank you for making the next update possible.
